audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L327-328 (`if (s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0) revert LiveAuction()`) runs unconditionally at the top of the `eligibleAssets` loop for every iteration, before the only write (`s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp` at L353). All external calls between check and write (`_getAssetPrice`) are `internal view virtual`, precluding reentrancy. No code path in `performUpkeep` sets `s_auctionStarts[asset]` without first passing the guard.
